title: Ability to add a Text Widget in board for instructions
excerpt:
To allow for clearer, more prominent instructions in boards, I would love to be able to add text widget at the top of a board that is visible to the team completing their tasks.

posts.author: beth1021 (Elisabeth Juliano)
posts.cookedHtml:
To allow for clearer, more prominent instructions in boards, I would love to be able to add text widget at the top of a board that is visible to the team completing their tasks.

Right now, we create a Doc for SOPs, however that means a user has to have two tabs open and flip back and forth between the SOP and the board when they are learning what is needed to complete their tasks.

It would be fantastic to be able to add a Text Widget at the top to provide a shorter version of information and instructions about the board for a user to see as they complete their tasks.

I understand there are other ways to provide information such as a text column with Board Description, Notes, utilize Updates, and Board Discussions, however those still require a user to know where to look and isn’t prominent at the top of the board.
